title: Telegram Bot — Notifications and Quick Commands
summary: Each user gets trade notifications pushed to Telegram when a trade executes, with a brief AI rationale. Morning briefing at market open: daily portfolio summary, market regime, what Decifer is watching. Quick commands: /pause, /resume, /positions, /pnl. Telegram is NEVER used for order execution — notifications only.
approach: Use python-telegram-bot (or aiogram — open question). One bot, per-user chat_id stored in strategy profile. On trade execute in AccountDecisionAgent: push notification with symbol, direction, price, rationale snippet (max 280 chars). Morning briefing job: fires at 09:20 ET, pulls portfolio snapshot, market regime from HMM, top 3 watched symbols. Commands: /pause sets kill_switch=True in container profile, /resume reverses. /positions and /pnl return formatted account summaries. Rate limit: batch notifications if multiple trades fire within 1 second — Telegram hard limit is 1 msg/sec per chat.
